title: Epic Structures: Igloo
description: Adds cozy Igloos of various sizes with a random underground piece under the large ones.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/835f96ebb79b4d1d1efc821a83aa46b84059b92b.jpeg)
---
![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77b41108a16fa64a002f23fff1e06c9f3e3b049a.jpeg)
---

This mod adds (/locate strcture epic:large/small_igloo) and improves minecraft igloos with ones varying in size with few vanilla special items and mobs. All built using vanilla features only, meaning no custom blocks or entities included.(FEEL FREE TO ADD TO ANY MODPACK)

What’s included:
• 5 large igloos
• 7 small igloos
• 9 underground structure pieces hidden beneath the larger Igloos

![News](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca058c19de609a2084ff4818646d5aeafaf12112.jpeg)
Be careful when flying with an elytra, as there is 1 layer of barriers very high in the sky above the igloos, temporary measure for igloos to spawn well)



![future](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ff1ce9a307bb9b8101cacac5facad40da04b13e.jpeg)

**LIST OF MODS THAT ARE WORK IN PROGRESS:**


✅ Epic Villages

✅ Epic Witch huts

✅ Epic Dungeons

🟨 Epic Jungle Temples (COMING SOON)

✅ Epic Igloos
